case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFRONIA VS. PROPERTY

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFRONIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE OF MOTION ANDMOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENT;S PETITIONER' SFIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFRONIA HEARING SET FOR JAN-18-2007 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 610
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-18-2007 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR DETAILS. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS
POS OF ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; TO FORM INTERROGATORIES; TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFRONIA
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFRONIA DUONG, LOUIE L

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $950.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT LOUIE L. DUONG. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,000.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

Notice Of Motion Andmotion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Document;S Petitioner' Sfirst Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jan-18-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Petitioner PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. Claimant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
